title: besleria glabra
intro: Besleria glabra, also known as the smooth besleria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Besleria glabra has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and prevent infections. It is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is said to have health benefits including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing.
